articles.title: Sebi introduces a simpler NISM certification for research services

topStories.title: Despite hurdles by YSRCP, development will not stop, asserts HRD Minister Lokesh
topStories.description: Referring to a social media post stating that a PIL has been filed in the High Court challenging land allotment for Google in Vizag, the Minister questions why YSRCP president Jagan Mohan Reddy harbours hatred for Andhra Pradesh’s youth and development

topStories.title: Middle East conflict: Is Russia helping Iran with advanced drone tactics? Here's what intel suggests
topStories.description: Western intelligence says Russia is helping Iran use drone warfare tactics developed in the Ukraine war to target US and Gulf interests. Shahed drones have proven effective against regional air defences, raising concerns about deeper Moscow–Tehran cooperation.

topStories.title: Iran's Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei Injured But 'Safe', Says President's Son
topStories.description: Iran's newly appointed supreme leader, Mojtaba Khamenei, has sustained injuries but remains "safe and sound," according to the Iranian president's son.

topStories.title: Amazon Wins Court Order Blocking Perplexity's AI Shopping Bot
topStories.description: Amazon, on Monday, won a court order blocking Perplexity from deploying its artificial intelligence (AI) shopping agents on its e-commerce platform. The decision was given by a California federal...

topStories.title: "Shashi Tharoor Should Counsel Them": Amit Shah's Swipe At Opposition
topStories.description: Amit Shah slammed the Opposition for bringing a notice seeking the removal of Lok Sabha Speaker Om Birla and also took a swipe at the Congress and the Leader of the Opposition (LoP) for allegedly...

topStories.title: Middle East conflict getting wider? As US moves shifts focus, North Korea rallies behind Iran, tests missiles
topStories.description: Kim Jong-un later hinted that important successes were achieved in putting strategic and tactical strike capabilities into practical use and deploying them for ‘actual war’.

topStories.title: US-Israel-Iran conflict: Amazon, Google, Microsoft offices in Middle East under threat? IRGC releases ‘target list’
topStories.description: As the Iran war entered its 12th day, the IRGC threatened to target economic centres and banks linked to the US and Israel across the region. The warning came after an Israeli strike on a Tehran bank, with Iran also listing offices and infrastructure tied to major US tech firms.

topStories.title: Van crash at White House gate prompts road closures in DC; driver detained, no injuries reported
topStories.description: The incident comes just days after two alleged ISIS terrorists hurled improvised explosive devices at a protest outside the New York mayor’s mansion.

dailyNews.title: US-Israel, Iran conflict: IEA to release 400 mn barrels of oil as Middle East war rattles global energy market
dailyNews.description: The International Energy Agency (IEA) on Wednesday (local time) announced that it will release 400 million barrels of oil from its emergency stockpile available to the market to address disruptions in the global energy markets stemming from the war in the Middle East.

dailyNews.title: Congress MP flays TDP remark on State formation
Iran's new leader Mojtaba Khamenei injured in airstrike that killed his father: Iran’s ambassador to Cyprus
dailyNews.description: The strike occurred during US-led air operations targeting Iran, when the residential compound of the supreme leader in central Tehran was hit.

dailyNews.title: US-Israel-Iran conflict: Will Trump administration change its West Asia military strategy amid rising oil prices?
dailyNews.description: US officials believe the country can withstand a short-term spike in oil prices for up to four weeks. The White House calls the rise a temporary disruption and is taking steps to stabilise markets.

dailyNews.title: G7 welcomes potential record release of oil reserves in bid to curb soaring prices
dailyNews.description: The group of nations welcomes the idea of releasing oil in response to the surge in prices since the US-Israel war with Iran began

dailyNews.title: US once rejected Ukraine's anti-Shahed drone tech: How the 'tactical error' is costing Trump govt dear amid Iran war
dailyNews.description: In August 2025, Zelenskyy offered Trump Ukraine’s proven anti-Shahed drone tech, including low-cost interceptors and combat hubs, but the US dismissed it. After Iran’s drone attacks escalated in 2026, the US reversed course, requesting Ukraine’s help to protect bases in the Middle East.

dailyNews.title: From Thailand to Pakistan, these countries are asking people to work from home to deal with fuel crisis
dailyNews.description: The fuel crisis stemming from the US-Iran conflict is leading countries to adopt work-from-home policies again. Governments, including Thailand and Pakistan, are implementing strategies to conserve fuel and mitigate disruptions caused by rising oil prices and shipping challenges.

dailyNews.title: Illegal immigrant’s two decades of unlawful votes expose the real 'threat' to democracy: Experts
dailyNews.description: After an illegal alien was discovered to have been voting, immigration experts that loss of voter confidence represents the true “serious threat" to American democracy.

dailyNews.title: 171 million travelers face airport delays as Democrats' DHS shutdown hits TSA staffing, Scalise warns
dailyNews.description: Airports across the U.S. are seeing long security lines as the DHS shutdown impacts TSA staffing, with 171 million travelers expected to fly in coming weeks.

dailyNews.title: Cowboys' Dak Prescott faces lurid allegations as wedding abruptly called off
dailyNews.description: Details emerged Tuesday around the alleged reason why Dallas Cowboys star Dak Prescott and his former fiancée broke off their wedding last week.

dailyNews.title: Former Kentucky cheerleader indicted on manslaughter charge after newborn son found dead in closet
dailyNews.description: Former University of Kentucky student-athlete accused of manslaughter and evidence tampering after newborn found dead in closet, indicted on felonies.

dailyNews.title: Canada’s Carney under pressure to act after synagogues shot at in latest antisemitic incidents
dailyNews.description: Gunfire attacks on Toronto synagogues highlight Canada's rising antisemitism crisis, as hate incidents against the country's Jewish community continues.

dailyNews.title: Trump posts support for Massie primary challenger ahead of Kentucky visit
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump continues blasting Rep. Thomas Massie and backing GOP primary challenger Ed Gallrein ahead of a Wednesday visit to Kentucky.

dailyNews.title: Sewage spill in Potomac River crushes oyster industry as seafood season ramps up: 'It's devastating us'
dailyNews.description: A massive sewage spill that dumped 240 million gallons into the Potomac River continues to devastate the oyster industry, with buyers refusing shellfish.

dailyNews.title: Kathie Lee Gifford calls out 'viciousness' on 'The View,' says everyone seems 'miserable'
dailyNews.description: Kathie Lee Gifford called out "The View" over it's "viciousness" during a podcast conversation on Monday, compared to her past appearances with Joy Behar and Whoopi Goldberg on the ABC show.

topStories.description: Sen. John Cornyn urged Republicans Wednesday to consider filibuster reform to advance Trump's voter ID bill, reversing his past stance as White House urges passage.

topStories.title: Trump touts 5-0 sweep by endorsed candidates in Tuesday primary elections
topStories.description: Trump's endorsed candidates had good results in Tuesday elections, as ex-White House fellow Clay Fuller advances to a Georgia runoff in April.

topStories.title: House GOP urges Trump to choke off Iran ally's oil profits as Middle East turmoil spikes US gas prices
topStories.description: House Republicans are urging President Trump to block profits from a major Russian oil company as Iran turmoil pushes gas prices higher across the U.S.

topStories.title: Trump’s Middle East envoy reveals what led to breakdown in Iran talks before Operation Epic Fury
topStories.description: U.S. Middle East envoy reveals what led to the collapse of the Iran nuclear talks, ultimately leading to Operation Epic Fury launch.

topStories.description: Outdated targeting data may have resulted in a mistaken missile strike, according to the ongoing military investigation, which undercuts President Trump’s assertion that Iran could be to blame.

topStories.description: In the lead-up to the U.S.-Israeli attack, President Trump downplayed the risks to the energy markets as a short-term concern that should not overshadow the mission to decapitate the Iranian regime.

dailyNews.description: The conflict is reshaping travel patterns, energy dependencies, living costs, trade routes and diplomatic alliances.

dailyNews.title: Trump Documents Missing in Epstein Files Highlight DOJ’s Missteps
dailyNews.description: In late July, an F.B.I. agent asked colleagues to get started on a sensitive task relating to Jeffrey Epstein, listing the names of 14 prominent men, with President Trump at the top.

dailyNews.title: A Trump-Xi Summit Nears, but China Doesn’t Know What Trump Wants
dailyNews.description: Trump’s agenda for the high-stakes meeting remains unclear to Beijing, Chinese analysts say, while American executives say they haven’t been invited along.

dailyNews.title: Trump Casts a Shadow Over One of Mexico’s Deadliest States
dailyNews.description: President Trump wants to strike cartels inside Mexico. In Sinaloa State, a cartel stronghold, some residents said they were willing to entertain U.S. intervention.

dailyNews.title: Clayton Fuller and Shawn Harris Advance to Runoff in Marjorie Taylor Greene’s Georgia District
dailyNews.description: Clayton Fuller will face Shawn Harris, a Democrat, in an April runoff. Mr. Fuller’s win over a flashier Republican showed the power of the president’s support.

dailyNews.title: Trump vows to end war "soon" as Iran hits ships and threatens banks
dailyNews.description: Trump says he'll end the war soon, when he wants to, as Iran hits 3 ships near the Strait of Hormuz and warns U.S.-linked banks will be next.

dailyNews.title: Trump told FIFA Iran is welcome to play in World Cup in U.S., officials say
dailyNews.description: President Trump told FIFA representatives Tuesday that Iran is welcome to play in the World Cup tournament in the United States, officials told CBS News.

dailyNews.title: What is the SAVE America Act? What to know about the bill Trump is pushing
dailyNews.description: President Trump and his allies are pushing Senate Republicans to pass an elections-related bill known as the SAVE America Act.

dailyNews.title: Vehicle crashes into barricade near White House, Secret Service investigating
dailyNews.description: A vehicle crashed into a barricade near the White House on Wednesday morning, authorities said.

dailyNews.title: Tim Scott hopes Fed Chair Powell investigation 'goes away' to clear Kevin Warsh confirmation
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump nominated Kevin Warsh to succeed Jerome Powell as Fed chair, but the process has been blocked amid a federal investigation into Powell.

dailyNews.title: Who is Markwayne Mullin? Trump ally will bring conservative immigration policies to DHS
dailyNews.description: Republicans are optimistic about Markwayne Mullin taking over the reins at DHS, while Democrats warn his tenure will be more of the same after Kristi Noem.

dailyNews.title: Anduril expands into space as defense tech angles to support Trump's Golden Dome
dailyNews.description: Anduril, founded by Oculus creator Palmer Luckey, is positioning itself to be a key player in President Trump's "Golden Dome" project.
